zh.lifeSummary: 當Angharad de Windsor於1104年出生在威爾士布洛可爾卡維時，她的父親Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle30歲，母親Nesta ferch Rhys20歲。她於1134年與William de Barri I結婚。他們至少是9個兒子的父母。她去世於1175年在英國英格蘭享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Angharad de Windsor于1104年出生在威尔士布洛可爾卡維时，她的父亲Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle30岁，母亲Nesta ferch Rhys20岁。她于1134年与William de Barri I结婚。他们至少是9个儿子的父母。她去世于1175年在英国英格兰享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Windsor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Windsor (Berkshire), Windsor in Stratford upon Avon (Warwickshire), Winsor in Copythorne (Hampshire), Winsor in Yealmpton (Devon), or Broadwindsor and Little Windsor (Dorset). All these places have the same linguistic origin, whose meaning is controversial, but seems to be ‘windlass bank’ (Old English windels + ōra).

in Yorkshire perhaps a habitational name from Winds Over in Middleton (near Ilkley, Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English wind ‘wind’ (genitive windes) + ofer ‘slope, hill, ridge’.

variants.name: Winzer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Ilse, Ingo, Wilhelm.
German: occupational name for a vine-grower or vintner, Middle High German winzer.
German: habitational name from any of various places so named in Bavaria.

variants.name: Winsor
meanings: English: variant of   Windsor  . This is the spelling used for places so named in Devon and Hampshire.
Perhaps also an Americanized form of German   Winzer  .

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Angharad de Windsor was born in 1104, in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, her father, Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle, was 30 and her mother, Nesta ferch Rhys, was 20. She married William de Barri I in 1134. They were the parents of at least 9 sons. She died in 1175, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Angharad de Windsor est née en 1104, à Carew, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Nesta ferch Rhys, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William de Barri I en 1134. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils. Elle est décédée en 1175, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Angharad de Windsor 1104 in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle 30 und ihre Mutter Nesta ferch Rhys 20. Sie hat 1134 William de Barri I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne. Sie starb 1175 im Alter von 71 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Angharad de Windsor è nata il nel 1104 nel Carew, Pembrokeshire, Galles, sua padre, Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Nesta ferch Rhys, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato William de Barri I nel 1134. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli. Morì nel 1175, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad de Windsorが1104年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアカーエウで生まれた時，父Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castleは30歳，母Nesta ferch Rhysは20歳であった。1134年にWilliam de Barri Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子の親であった。彼女は1175年にイギリスイギリスで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad de Windsor(이)가 1104년 웨일스 p브로케실르 카레에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nesta ferch Rhys(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1134년 William de Barri I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1175년 영국 잉글랜드에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Angharad de Windsor nasceu em 1104, em Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Nesta ferch Rhys, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Barri I em 1134. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1175, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angharad de Windsor родилась в 1104 г. в местности карю, пемброкешир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Nesta ferch Rhys, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Barri I в 1134 г. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей. Она умерла в 1175 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Angharad de Windsor nació en 1104, en Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Nesta ferch Rhys, tenía 20 años. Se casó con William de Barri I en 1134. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos. Murió en 1175, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años.
